steps.title: Find the second mean
steps.content:
For data set B, add the values and divide by the count.
$$
\frac{1+1+2+2+3+3+4}{7}=\frac{16}{7}
$$

steps.title: Compare the means
steps.content: Compare $4$ with $\frac{16}{7}$. $$ 4>\frac{16}{7} $$ The mean of data set A is greater than the mean of data set B. The answer is D.
